creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
mail/p5-Mail-SPF and mail/p5-Mail-SPF-Query both install spfd and spfquery binarys as well as some manpages.  bin/spfquery and the corresponding manpages conflict directly and both install a spfd binary (one to bin and the other to sbin) but only one spfd manpage is installed.

Fix: 

Mark the packages as conflicting.
